records.ety: [F. utensile, ustensile, L. utensile, fr. utensilis that may be used, fit for use, fr. uti, p. p. usus, to use. See Use, v. t.]

defs: That which is used; an instrument; an implement; especially, an instrument or vessel used in a kitchen, or in domestic and farming business.
quotes: Wagons fraught with utensils of war.
